name: composite-showcase first-load contract
description: Verifies composite-showcase stage renders non-empty content on zero state — before any player input.

1.name: Maven
1.description: A cyberpunk clinic operator who runs a ripperdoc service and a stall.
1.scenario: A cyberpunk clinic in a neon-lit district.

assertions.description: render() must not throw on zero state
render() must produce >10 chars of visible text before any player input
